title: JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL KLAMATH COUNTY WORKFORCE JOB CONNECTION JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to the internet, computers, and other resources needed to search and apply for employment. 3401 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday: 9am-1pm, 1:30pm-5pm by appointment only Tuesday: by appointment only Email (541) 884-9642 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 884-9642 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Career Counseling Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers Displaced Worker Employment Programs Employment Transition Counseling Ex-Offender Employment Programs Job Finding Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
